flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Meredith College fell 16% between 2021 and 2024 (1.4k → 1.2k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Meredith College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($41.2k → $45.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Meredith College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($41.2k → $45.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Meredith College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.7% → 0.0%).
